title: Global mutex in IPCHandler is unnecessary — saucer exposes run serially on one thread
evidence: static std::mutex s_state_mtx; // ponytail: single lock, per-command if contention
suggestion: The global mutex is never contended (Saucer's exposed functions execute on the main thread). Remove it to simplify the code and avoid a false sense of thread-safety.

notes.text: Removed global std::mutex and all lock_guard usages from IPCHandler.cpp
